description: main branch direct-edit policy. Git-tracked assets should be changed in an owned worktree; only local runtime files and generated local hook settings may be edited directly on main.

tier1_main_allowed.description: Main direct Edit/Write allowlist for local runtime state that is not part of a PR.

escape_hatch.description: Emergency escape hatch for urgent fixes or broken worktree hooks.

tier_classification_guide.description: New tracked files default to worktree-required. Add only git-ignored local runtime paths here.
tier3_default: all git-tracked source, docs, tests, metadata, and hook assets
